title: [codereview P1] draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md:293 table line refs (rules.rs:59) will bit-rot; use symbolic names like LINK_LOCAL_COAP_RULE instead
description: After Appendix A update, comments reference specific line numbers in rules.rs that are fragile. Also Rule 5/6 line refs point to const but should verify against current implementation. File: spec/drafts/draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md:300
close_reason: Fixed fragile line numbers by using symbolic const names (LINK_LOCAL_COAP_RULE) and clarified OSCORE handling in updated Appendix A. Duplication acknowledged with sync note. References numbering fixed and OSCORE RFC added. 3 review passes now clean of P0/P1/P2 findings.
